assessments.remaining_question: What is the maximum qualifying interval and do issue closure and pull-request closure behave identically?
Do comment-only and changes-requested review objects prevent the award, and must the author also be the merger?
Which merged PRs GitHub attributes internally and where each exact tier boundary lies.
How squash, rebase, merge commits, email matching, and rewritten history affect final attribution.
Exact accepted-answer totals immediately around each displayed tier.
The exact star boundaries and persistence across ownership transfer, forks, archival, and falling counts.
